description: CLI tool & MCP server for logging and semantically searching decisions using Ollama embeddings and SQLite

userStories.title: Project scaffolding
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a TypeScript project with all deps, Biome, and directory structure so I can start building.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json exists with commander, better-sqlite3, sqlite-vec, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, uuid as deps
tsconfig.json configured for ES2022, Node16 module
Directories exist: src/core, src/infra, src/cli/commands, src/mcp, bin
Scripts in package.json: format, format:check, typecheck, test, build
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #1. No tests needed — just file existence and script validation.

userStories.title: Core types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need shared types (Decision, Project, repo/client interfaces) so all layers have a common contract.
acceptanceCriteria: src/core/types.ts exports: DECISION_STATUSES, DecisionStatus, Decision, Project, CreateDecisionInput, UpdateDecisionInput, SearchInput, SearchResult, IProjectRepo, IDecisionRepo, IEmbeddingClient
Copy test from GitHub issue #2 into src/core/types.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #2 for complete test file.

userStories.title: Configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need config resolution (defaults → env vars → CLI flags) so the tool is configurable.
acceptanceCriteria: src/core/config.ts exports resolveConfig(overrides?) returning { ollamaUrl, model, dbPath }
Env vars LOGD_OLLAMA_URL, LOGD_MODEL, LOGD_DB_PATH override defaults
CLI flag overrides override env vars
Copy test from GitHub issue #3 into src/core/config.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #3 for complete test file.

userStories.title: Embedding service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need embedding template builders and a service that calls the embedding client.
acceptanceCriteria: Document template: 'Decision: {title}\nContext: {context}\n...' with only present fields
Query template: 'Instruct: Given a question about past decisions, retrieve relevant decision records\nQuery: {query}'
Copy test from GitHub issue #4 into src/core/embedding.service.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #4 for complete test file.

userStories.title: Ollama client
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an HTTP wrapper for Ollama's /api/embed endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Throws 'Cannot connect to Ollama at {url}. Is it running?' on connection error
Copy test from GitHub issue #5 into src/infra/ollama.client.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #5 for complete test file.

userStories.title: Database setup and migrations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SQLite + sqlite-vec setup with auto-migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Sets WAL journal mode and foreign_keys ON
Creates projects table (id, name UNIQUE, description, created_at)
Creates decisions table (id, project FK, title, context, alternatives, tags, status, links, created_at, updated_at)
Creates decisions_vec virtual table using vec0 with float[1024] embedding
Copy test from GitHub issue #6 into src/infra/db.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #6 for complete test file.

userStories.title: Project repository
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SQLite queries for project CRUD.
acceptanceCriteria: findByName is case-insensitive and trims whitespace
list returns all ordered by name
Copy test from GitHub issue #7 into src/infra/project.repo.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #7 for complete test file. Depends on US-006.

userStories.title: Decision repository
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SQLite queries for decision CRUD and vector search.
acceptanceCriteria: create inserts into both decisions and decisions_vec tables
findById parses JSON array fields (alternatives, tags, links)
update changes only specified fields, optionally replaces embedding
list filters by project, status, respects limit, orders by created_at desc
searchByVector returns scored results via cosine distance, filterable by project
Copy test from GitHub issue #8 into src/infra/decision.repo.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #8 for complete test file. Depends on US-006.

userStories.title: Decision service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need business logic for decision CRUD, search, and validation.
acceptanceCriteria: create: validates project exists, generates UUID, computes embedding, stores, defaults status to 'active'
create: throws with available project names when project not found
getById: returns decision or throws 'Decision {id} not found'
update: partial update, uses 'input.project !== undefined' check, re-computes embedding
delete: throws if not found, delegates to repo
list: defaults limit to 20, status param typed as DecisionStatus
search: embeds query, defaults limit to 5, filters by threshold when provided
Copy test from GitHub issue #9 into src/core/decision.service.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #9 for complete test file. Depends on US-004, US-007, US-008.

userStories.title: Project service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need business logic for project CRUD with name normalization.
acceptanceCriteria: create: normalizes name (lowercase, trim), generates UUID, delegates to repo
create: throws 'Project {name} already exists' on duplicate
Copy test from GitHub issue #10 into src/core/project.service.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #10 for complete test file. Depends on US-007.

userStories.title: CLI entrypoint and project commands
userStories.description: As a user, I want logd project create/list commands so I can manage projects.
acceptanceCriteria: src/cli/index.ts wires up Commander with project subcommand
Copy test from GitHub issue #11 into src/cli/commands/project.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #11 for complete test file. Depends on US-003, US-010.

userStories.title: CLI add command
userStories.description: As a user, I want logd add <title> to create decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: src/cli/commands/add.ts implements add command with flags: --project, --context, --alternatives, --tags, --status, --links
Repeatable flags for alternatives, tags, links
Copy test from GitHub issue #12 into src/cli/commands/add.test.ts
npm test -- src/cli/commands/add.test.ts passes (requires Ollama running)
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #12 for complete test file. Depends on US-009, US-011. Tests need Ollama running.

userStories.title: CLI search command
userStories.description: As a user, I want logd search <query> to find decisions semantically.
acceptanceCriteria: Default output: title, project, similarity score, ID
Copy test from GitHub issue #13 into src/cli/commands/search.test.ts
npm test -- src/cli/commands/search.test.ts passes (requires Ollama running)
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #13 for complete test file. Depends on US-009, US-011.

userStories.title: CLI show command
userStories.description: As a user, I want logd show <id> to view a decision in full detail.
acceptanceCriteria: Outputs all fields of the decision
Copy test from GitHub issue #14 into src/cli/commands/show.test.ts
npm test -- src/cli/commands/show.test.ts passes (requires Ollama running)
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #14 for complete test file. Depends on US-009, US-011.

userStories.title: CLI list command
userStories.description: As a user, I want logd list to see all decisions with optional filters.
acceptanceCriteria: Default limit: 20, ordered by created_at desc
Compact output: title, project, status, ID
Copy test from GitHub issue #15 into src/cli/commands/list.test.ts
npm test -- src/cli/commands/list.test.ts passes (requires Ollama running)
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #15 for complete test file. Depends on US-009, US-011.

userStories.title: CLI edit command
userStories.description: As a user, I want logd edit <id> to partially update a decision.
acceptanceCriteria: Copy test from GitHub issue #16 into src/cli/commands/edit.test.ts
npm test -- src/cli/commands/edit.test.ts passes (requires Ollama running)
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #16 for complete test file. Depends on US-009, US-011.

userStories.title: CLI delete command
userStories.description: As a user, I want logd delete <id> to remove a decision immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Copy test from GitHub issue #17 into src/cli/commands/delete.test.ts
npm test -- src/cli/commands/delete.test.ts passes (requires Ollama running)
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #17 for complete test file. Depends on US-009, US-011.

userStories.title: MCP server
userStories.description: As an AI agent, I want an MCP server so I can store and search decisions programmatically.
acceptanceCriteria: src/mcp/server.ts exports MCP server with 8 tools: logd_add_decision, logd_search_decisions, logd_show_decision, logd_edit_decision, logd_delete_decision, logd_list_decisions, logd_create_project, logd_list_projects
src/cli/commands/serve.ts implements 'logd serve' starting MCP server with stdio transport
Tools delegate to DecisionService and ProjectService
Copy test from GitHub issue #18 into src/mcp/server.test.ts (adapt pseudocode to actual MCP SDK API)
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #18 for test skeleton. Depends on US-009, US-010.

userStories.title: E2E smoke tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests verifying the full CLI workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/cli.test.ts runs full workflow: create project → add decision → search → show → edit → list → delete
Uses mock Ollama server (HTTP server returning fixed 1024-dim vectors)
Tests error cases: add with non-existent project, duplicate project, show/delete non-existent ID
Copy test from GitHub issue #19 into tests/e2e/cli.test.ts
userStories.notes: See GitHub issue #19 for complete test file. Depends on all previous stories.
